## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Type '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Browser:** Chrome / Edge / Brave (version)
- **SafePrompt Version:** 1.0.0
- **AI Platform:** ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini / Other
- **OS:** Windows / macOS / Linux

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.

> **Important:** Do NOT include real PII in bug reports. Use example/dummy data.
